Oakland, California · Est. 2012

A new world
requires a new
way of learning.

Social justice Montessori education where 90% of students exceed literacy benchmarks — and no family is turned away.

Schedule a Tour Support Us

90%

Exceed literacy benchmarks

While only 22% of Black and Latino students nationally reach proficiency.

80%

Receive financial aid

We believe access to excellent education is a right, not a privilege.

95%

Students of color

A school that reflects and centers the communities it serves.

Our Mission

Education for liberation.

Our decolonial Montessori curriculum centers Black, Indigenous, and students of color — not as an afterthought, but as the foundation of everything we teach.

Founded by Michele Hamilton, a trailblazing educator from East Oakland with 27+ years of experience, Pear Tree is both a model school and a training site for educational policy development.

Read our story →
Featured in London Review of Education

Academic Framework

Four Pillars of Excellence

PTCS supports young people in becoming producers of academic and cultural content and critical thinkers of cultural and academic consumption.

01

Social Justice & Civic Engagement

An historical-based curriculum engaging a deep sense of self and connection to ancestral contributions in mathematics, literature, philosophy, sciences and the arts.

02

Cultural Art Enrichments

Expressive arts rooted in the traditions of the students we serve — deepening connections, addressing historical trauma, and supporting agency through creation and performance.

03

Rigorous Academics

Montessori-aligned content to deepen independence, strengthen writing, engage with mathematics as creative expression, and navigate the sciences with wonder and awe.

04

Social & Emotional Learning

Intentional curriculum to deepen peer community, knowledge of self, emotional literacy, and the ability to navigate social dynamics with thoughtfulness and intention.

Ages 2+

Preschool

Dragonfly & Butterfly Classrooms

TK – 5th Grade

Elementary

Hummingbird, Falcon & Dolphin Classrooms

What parents say

"The thoughtfulness, creativity and love of the teachers — staff really 'see' each child and support healthy peer relationships."

— Pear Tree Parent, via Berkeley Parents Network

Beyond the Classroom

Enrichments & Field Trips

Sound Recording & Video

Students create their own documentaries, video journals, and songs — becoming producers of content, not just consumers.

Cultural Arts

Art, music, dance, Capoeira, Spanish, and gardening — in partnership with The People's Conservatory.

Educational Journeys

Curriculum-aligned trips to Chabot Space Center, Oakland Museum, UC Berkeley Botanical Garden, and multi-day cultural immersions.

Join our community.

Whether you're looking for a school that sees your child, or you want to invest in education that transforms — there's a place for you here.

Schedule a Tour Make a Gift

Pear Tree Community School

A social justice Montessori school in Oakland serving preschool through 5th grade. No family will be turned away.
